# Skills by Jesse Vincent (Superpowers)

**Author:** [Jesse Vincent](https://github.com/obra) / Prime Radiant
**Source:** [obra/superpowers](https://github.com/obra/superpowers)
**Distribution:** [anthropics/claude-plugins-official](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official) (plugin: `superpowers`)
**License:** See original repository

Superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology. It teaches Claude brainstorming, subagent-driven development with built-in code review, systematic debugging, TDD, git worktree management, and verification-before-completion discipline.

## Skills

| Skill | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `brainstorming` | Explores user intent, requirements and design before any creative work |
| `dispatching-parallel-agents` | Coordinate 2+ independent tasks without shared state |
| `executing-plans` | Execute implementation plans in separate sessions with review checkpoints |
| `finishing-a-development-branch` | Structured merge/PR/cleanup decision after implementation |
| `receiving-code-review` | Technical rigor when processing review feedback |
| `requesting-code-review` | Verify work meets requirements before merging |
| `subagent-driven-development` | Parallel implementation with independent tasks in current session |
| `systematic-debugging` | Structured diagnosis before proposing fixes |
| `test-driven-development` | Red-green TDD before writing implementation code |
| `using-git-worktrees` | Isolated worktrees with smart directory selection |
| `using-superpowers` | Meta: skill discovery and invocation protocol |
| `verification-before-completion` | Evidence before claiming work is done |
| `writing-plans` | Multi-step task planning before touching code |
| `writing-skills` | Skill authoring, editing, and deployment verification |
